Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (tax credit for charitable gifts)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends section 118.1 of the Income Tax Act to provide an additional non-refundable tax credit to taxpayers whose total eligible charitable gifts for the current taxation year are greater than the total eligible charitable gifts claimed in the 2009 taxation year.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Income Tax (tax credit for charitable gifts)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (tax credit for charitable gifts)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. Section 118.1 of the Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (3):

Para.change: (3.1) For the purpose of computing the tax payable under this Part by an individual for a taxation year, there may be deducted such additional amount as the individual claims, subject to the lifetime tax credit limit set in subsection (3.2), not exceeding the amount determined by the formula

Ais the amount by which the individualâs total charitable gifts made in the current taxation year exceeds the total charitable gifts declared and claimed as a deduction under subsection (3) by the individual in 2009; and
(a) 10%, if the individualâs total charitable gifts made in the current taxation year exceeds $200, or
(3.2) For the purposes of the calculation in subsection (3.1), the lifetime tax credit limit is $10,000.

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
